violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC stated supplier is coming to install dispensers. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of multiple pieces of equipment in the basement have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC stated many of these items are planned for disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
Fan guard is missing on the walk-in fan. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
